contract.payment_cadence: Fixed price per line item; NRE labor billed by task order; travel reimbursable per GSA/FTR
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Black Swift S0 sUAS Platforms: 675 units across 5 ordering periods at escalating unit prices ($18,000 to $20,655)

Mission Days Operational support (30 days/year @ $2,850), Operational and Testing Support (6 sessions/year @ $6,000), Operator/Observer Training (1 session @ $6,000), Instructor Training (1 session @ $600) across all 5 periods
Travel for Operational Support (NTE $50,000 per ordering period × 5 periods, FTR-compliant, no profit/fee applied)
Operator and Observer Course Development ($6,000 × 5 periods) and Instructor Training Course Development ($6,000 × 5 periods)

Non-recurring Engineering: Technical Documentation of Software/Hardware Development (NTE $66,000 × 5 periods), Modeling (NTE $66,000 × 5 periods), NHC operational workflow integration (NTE $66,000 × 5 periods)
